name: time_reset
description: Time::Reset clears frame accumulators and captures the current GetTickCount baseline in seconds.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Reset@Time@@YAXXZ at 0x4a5670 still fails: 23 unmasked mismatches, 32 relocation bytes masked, 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 90 bytes, VC object symbol size 96 bytes.

Reviewed difference is import/linkage shape: the original calls the linked KERNEL32_GetTickCount import thunk, while the isolated COFF object emits an indirect __imp__GetTickCount@0 call. Arithmetic now matches the recovered fild-qword and fmul-dword shape.
